overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Kerala.

rules.title: Review Kerala Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Kerala Shops and Commercial Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Kerala Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Kerala labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under Kerala labour laws.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Kerala provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Kerala Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Kerala Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Kerala Labour Welfare Fund, including employer and employee contributions where applicable.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest Kerala minimum wage notifications for the applicable scheduled employment.

rules.title: Review State Labour Notifications
rules.description: Monitor notifications issued by the Government of Kerala affecting labour law compliance.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour welfare, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory returns, labour inspections, licence renewals and compliance due dates.
